User.title: User
User.description: User profile representation in the unified database.

uid.description: The unique user ID matching request.auth.uid

name.description: The full name of the user

email.description: The verified Gmail address of the user

photoURL.description: Optional profile picture URL from Google

Enrollment.title: Enrollment
Enrollment.description: A course enrollment created by the user.

/users/{userId}.description: Primary user profile storage mapped by UID

/users/{userId}/enrollments/{enrollmentI.description: Sub-collection tracking each user's enrolled courses
